umbra_philosopher_user_response.description: Short in-character response from the umbra philosopher, addressed to the user.

umbra_philosopher_other_response.description: Short in-character response addressed to the lumen philosopher (optional; use empty string if none).

umbra_philosopher_notes.description: Optional notes: Words or short phrases the umbra philosopher jots down. Use [] if none.

umbra_philosopher_callouts.description: Optional callouts: [[word_or_phrase, mode], ...] with mode one of keyword, highlight, strike.
